name: XteinkDetect
description: FreeInk Xteink X3/X4 runtime auto-detection. The X3 and X4 share one ESP32-C3 binary but differ in panel controller (UC8253 vs SSD1677) and battery backend. An I2C fingerprint of the X3-only peripherals (BQ27220 gauge, DS3231 RTC, QMI8658 IMU) on SDA20/SCL0 distinguishes the two; this helper probes, calls BoardConfig::selectDevice(), and reports whether to put the display in X3 mode.
